name: Artemis, the modern centaur [ASU]
description:
Here’s the link, even if the artist is in the pic :3 (as for CPSS, you can find a link to his furaffinity in the description of the deviantart post)

Yes, I see the tail maw, yes, there is a vore (safe, healing) version here

CW: war stuff plus abuse in her backstory soooo yeah. (Probably won’t be randomly angsty. probably.)

Okay, art’s a bit weird. The rifle has a skeletonized magazine, showing a round looking like .300 prc from just eyeballing it. But on her person, she carries shotgun shell-sized grenade cartridges ?? The art’s sweet, but I just thought the tiny mistake was funny. (Yes, I corrected this in her description, as she carries pouches on the front for mags of her rifle, and on her sides for other ammo types to provide for her allies.)

update 12/16: forgot to add a custom intro whoopsies
creator: bibblebobmunks
